read: TileLang is a promising sparse-attention backward path, but the current e2e bottleneck question has two layers. Isolated compressed-dKV accumulation can now be driven to about 5.11 ms at S4096/H64/D512 with HSK BF16 source tensors and selected-limit reduction. End-to-end TorchTitan still needs the deferred 8x additive profile because the retained 4x/8x profiles rank MoE routed backward skew, owner-rank VJP math, activation checkpoint recompute, and loss/lm-head ahead of sparse attention in the current prototype canary.

single_gpu_tilelang_repro.decision: Promote the HSK BF16 source kernel as the next sparse-dKV candidate. Do not promote the materialized pack bridge as production-ready.

current_bottleneck_read.bottleneck: compressed dKV many-to-one accumulation plus bridge/materialization overhead
current_bottleneck_read.evidence: TileLang selected-limit reduction cuts the target-shape dKV producer to 5.11 ms when fed BF16 HSK source tensors, while materialized pack+kernel is 8.18 ms and dynamic warmed planning is 10.48 ms.
current_bottleneck_read.next: Fuse probability and LI-derivative production into the TileLang source contract, cache/precompute static route plans for fixed S/layer shape, and avoid materialized selected-state tensors.

current_bottleneck_read.bottleneck: not yet re-ranked after the TileLang source path
current_bottleneck_read.evidence: Existing low-intrusion/deep 4x profiles still rank MoE routed backward skew, owner-rank VJP math, activation checkpoint recompute, and loss/lm-head above sparse attention for the retained prototype path.
current_bottleneck_read.next: Run the staged 8x low-intrusion additive profile once do-sonle5-mi350-gpu is free, with explicit TileLang call timers and MORI/MoE phase timers.

commands: ssh do-sonle-kernel docker run ... python3 benchmark_tilelang_selected_limit_adapter.py --seq-len 4096 --groups 1024 --heads 64 --dim 512 --layer-id 2 --group-panel-size 512 --panel-capacity 512 --token-block 16 --block-k 64 --block-d 64 --threads 512 --input-layout bshd --plan-on-device --skip-group-filter --backend-path /work/sources/wip/torchtitan/torchtitan/models/deepseek_v4/sparse_mla_shared_kv_triton_forward_backend.py --warmup-iters 2 --timed-iters 5
ssh do-sonle5-mi350-gpu pgrep/rocm-smi/docker inspection for 8x availability
